svg.text: Direct task text or task file
Agent reads: queue snapshot, CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, README.md, nearby .md files
Waves: same wave = parallel | later waves wait | merge gates progress
Start rules: earliest unresolved wave only | pending merge blocks same-wave starts
Wakes: completion, merge ready, breaker, timeout
Worker pipe lifecycle (auto-develop.ps1, per worktree branch)
No other merge prepared, clean repo,
After each resolution: replan queue if needed → start next wave
